## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager screen for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX.ai](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is building an advanced content generation platform with AI-driven pipelines and workflows](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=236.0)
  - [The role requires balancing client management, content quality, and process improvement](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [GrowthX aims to architect business processes beyond just content, with long-term goals of exposing the platform externally](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Generation Platform

  - [Internal tool called Atlas for building workflows and pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Focuses on delivering high-quality content at scale for clients](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Uses AI and LLMs but requires human oversight to ensure quality and accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Collects data on what works, down to word choice level, to improve content performance](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)

### Role of Technical Managing Editor

  - [Manages content managers (CMs) who oversee client pipelines](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Identifies process issues and articulates fixes or engages resources to improve](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Balances client expectations with internal quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
  - [Requires understanding of content, workflows, and AI tooling](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### Client Management and Content Quality

  - [Work with \~70 clients across various industries](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [Need to balance SEO, readability, and client-specific requirements](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Example: Ensuring medical accuracy and appropriate tone for women's health content](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=2617.0)
  - [Challenging hallucinations and inaccuracies from AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=2649.0)

### Process Improvement and Innovation

  - [Opportunity to directly impact product development](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
  - [New features often born from client needs, articulated by MEs](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
  - [Goal to make the platform usable even for those with limited content experience](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
  - [Continuous iteration and learning from editing and content improvements](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)

### Long-term Vision

  - [Become the best platform for end-to-end content generation and performance understanding](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Eventually expose the platform to external users](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1559.0)
  - [Expand beyond content to architect other business processes (e.g., sales)](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1783.0)
  - [Create a dynamic, self-regulating rulebook for AI to improve content quality automatically](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=1910.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up chat with Andy or other team members](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=2787.0)
  - [Evaluate candidate's fit for the role based on content experience and process improvement skills](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=2787.0)
  - [Consider candidate's ability to adapt to the fast-paced, evolving nature of the platform and company](https://fathom.video/share/UzsAiqPdQ6sytCiu7-mxaD5M66wWvPM4?tab=summary&timestamp=2787.0)
